construct: Demonstrates understanding of social, economic and political development in fostering national development and upholding human dignity

subSkills.label: Demonstrates principles of patriotism, promotes social justice and good governance in real life situations
topicAliases: Characteristics of Good and Bad Governance

elementsOfConstruct.description: Utilises resources to foster personal and national development

subSkills.label: Exhibit good planning skills and manages resources to foster personal, community and national development
topicAliases: The concept Economic and Social Development

elementsOfConstruct.description: Resolves conflict and Collaborates with others in local, regional and international affairs to promote national development.

subSkills.label: Resolves real life conflicts for a peaceful society; collaborates with local, regional and international stakeholders

elementsOfConstruct.description: Exhibits principles, good morals and values in day to day life

subSkills.label: Integrates cultural understanding and personal responsibility to promote integrity, combat corruption, foster self-control, strengthen family and legal relationships

components.structureNotes: SBA Form 2: 5 tasks/100. All 4 EoC. Tests, debates, projects, presentations, role play. Project spans Form 2-3.
Section A: EoC1+2 (2 items each, answer 1 per EoC). Section B: EoC3+4 (1 item each, all compulsory). Scenario-based. Duration 2h30. 70%.

rules: SBA marked out of 100 per year; raw marks submitted to ECZ.
Final Exam: scenario-based items; more marks for analysis and evaluation.
Candidates must analyse presented scenarios appropriately to score.
Both SBA and Final Exam required for grading.

exemplars.scenarioTheme: Patriotism and good citizenship scenario with multi-part tasks (~15 marks chosen task style)
